result.stdout:
Description:
  AI-powered project documentation generator using coding agent CLIs (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini).

Usage:
  AiDocs [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  apply-agents             Apply agent instruction files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, copilot-instructions.md, guidelines.md).
  apply-library-devguides  Discover and apply framework devguides by scanning for *.prompt.md sentinel files.
  apply-standard-docs      Generate standard docs (Quickstart, Deployment, Architecture), update README.md, and add docs to solution file.

commands.payload:
Description:
  AI-powered project documentation generator using coding agent CLIs (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini).

Usage:
  AiDocs [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  apply-agents             Apply agent instruction files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, copilot-instructions.md, guidelines.md).
  apply-library-devguides  Discover and apply framework devguides by scanning for *.prompt.md sentinel files.
  apply-standard-docs      Generate standard docs (Quickstart, Deployment, Architecture), update README.md, and add docs to solution file.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Apply agent instruction files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, copilot-instructions.md, guidelines.md).

Usage:
  AiDocs apply-agents [options]

Options:
  --agent <agent>              Coding agent to use: claude, copilot, or gemini. Auto-detected if not specified (prefers claude > copilot > gemini).
  --cli-path <cli-path>        Path to the coding agent CLI executable. Auto-detected if not specified.
  --working-dir <working-dir>  The target project directory to document. Defaults to current directory.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
